svg.title: FRED RAG API — full flow diagram
svg.desc: Shows ingest flow and query flow through config, embedder, chromadb, retriever, llm, and main

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how the FRED API fetch works in ingest.py')
sendPrompt('Explain what ingest.py does step by step')
sendPrompt('Explain what embedder.py does and why we load the model at module level')
sendPrompt('Explain how ChromaDB stores and retrieves vectors')
sendPrompt('What does the /query endpoint expect as input?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through what main.py does when it receives a query')
sendPrompt('Explain how retriever.py embeds the query and searches ChromaDB')
sendPrompt('Why does the retriever reuse the same embedder as ingest?')
sendPrompt('How does ChromaDB find the closest matching chunks?')
sendPrompt('Explain how llm.py routes between Ollama and Bedrock')
sendPrompt('How does the Ollama client work in llm.py?')
sendPrompt('How does the Bedrock converse call work in llm.py?')
sendPrompt('What does config.py do and why does every module import from it?')
